## Source: amazon-inspector (bf25a3a07b9adf8865f783819176d646b7c5485aeb1539422555bf596abfeaa7)
The package shopify-app-extension-template was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (ad76901f1a6a9ae19aa018626e3848451caf26a7d91cfff95cd4c591145657d1)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'shopify-app-extension-template' @ 1.0.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
